title: DTI - OWO
description: The mod is based on an old favourite of mine (Dense Ores) along with the Poor Coal Ore block from Railcraft.
body:
Mod Description:

This mod adds both Better and Worse ores for the vanilla ores, you can find 3 better ores and 3 worse ores. They're found underground in huge spherical clusters. I am looking for feedback for these as they might be a little too common or scarce. I've not tested it too much as of right now.

 

All of the items within the mod are going to get new textures with later fixes and improvements. I just wanted to get this out so I can think about making new and more interesting projects. The items within game need the new tool (Hammer) to break them into smaller pieces or compact them into the bigger chunks for more storage.

 

Ore Tier List (Worst to Best):

Scanty Ore, Reduced Ore, Poor Ore, Vanilla Ore, Enriched Ore, Wealthy Ore, Pristine Ore

Credits:
- Maya for the Ore Textures. I love you. <3 :)
- Callum for the help with the more complicated code, love you too buddy. ;D (1.16.5)
- Daleeny for the Hammer textures.
- Covert_Jaguar and rwtema for inspiring me for the mod idea.
- Direwolf20 for giving me the interest of modding.
